sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 546 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25. 2. For orders on CMA No.3060/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 26.02.2026 Mr. Khadim Ali Kaka, advocate files power on behalf of applicant, same is taken on record. Prima facie order on interim application rendered by the Appellate Tribunal has been impugned before this court in reference jurisdiction. The reference is pending for four years without any progress and applicant has made no effort to the have the matter listed for almost four years. Even today counsel seeks time for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
